caption: A person wearing a dark gray long-sleeved sweater and a pink smartwatch holds a small white plastic bottle of "Blender's Pen" in their hands. They are positioned over a white gridded cutting mat on a light-colored wooden surface. To the left, a card is partially visible with the text "u You littl' Letide Cheer" and "You warm my heart" alongside a floral illustration. A blue piece of paper lies beneath the bottle on the mat. A logo reading "stamping Jill" is visible at the bottom of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the person's hands remain in a relatively static position, gripping the bottle with their right hand and supporting it from below with their left. There is very little movement across the frames, with only minor shifts in the positioning of the fingers and the angle of the bottle as the person prepares to use it.
